rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7
candidate_summary: INUKSUK 3-level graded geometric output-diagnostic ladder: (1) NALUNAIKKUTAQ single-token Y/N 'on-task' check every step; (2) TIKKUUTI 2-3 token next-step direction check every 10 steps; (3) INUNNGUAQ full multi-token output sample at completion. Token-count complexity = diagnostic depth proxy. Upper levels imply lower (chain-implies).

results_analysis.title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute (ICLR 2025 Oral)
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: prompt-difficulty-dependent adaptive scaling allocates compute by difficulty — same graded-eval-depth-by-need pattern. sem=0.84 and func=0.82 both clearly exceed 0.7 threshold.

results_analysis.title: Test-Time Scaling Survey
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: Survey decomposes test-time eval into Parallel/Sequential/Hybrid/Internal — multi-mode graded structure analogous to INUKSUK's 3 levels. Both sem and func exceed threshold.

results_analysis.title: Speculative Cascades (Google Research)
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: Speculative cascade is explicitly cheap-then-expensive — directly maps to INUKSUK's graded depth ladder. Both sem and func clearly above 0.7.

results_analysis.title: Is Escalation Worth It? Decision-Theoretic LLM Cascades
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: Decision-theoretic cascade with small-then-large escalation — same multi-level diagnostic pattern with chain-implies semantics. Both metrics over threshold.

results_analysis.title: C3PO: Optimized LLM Cascades with Probabilistic Cost Constraints
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: Cost-constrained cascade optimization with graded compute ladder — matches token-count-as-complexity-proxy concept. Both sem and func over 0.7.

results_analysis.title: Dynamic Model Routing and Cascading: Survey
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: Survey of routing+cascading covers the broad multi-level mechanism. Both sem (0.72) and func (0.72) exceed threshold.

results_analysis.title: Cascaded LMs for Cost-Effective Human-AI Decision
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: sem=0.70 exactly meets threshold (>=0.7). func=0.68 below threshold but rule is OR, so hit stands on semantic alone. Cascade for human-AI decision-making — narrower scope but semantic similarity holds.

results_analysis.title: Pay for Hints Not Answers: LLM Shepherding
results_analysis.verifier_note: Confirmed: LLM emits short prefix hint then SLM completes — exact cheap-prefix-then-expensive-completion pattern matching INUKSUK's single-token-then-multi-token chain. Both sem and func over 0.7.

verdict_sentence: Candidate FAILS novelty: 8 of 8 retrieved results are hits (all 8 by semantic >=0.7, 7 also by functional >=0.7, 0 by keyword) — well above the threshold_for_fail of 1; the 3-level graded cheap-to-expensive cascade with chain-implies is densely covered by prior art (Scaling Test-Time Compute, Speculative Cascades, decision-theoretic cascades, C3PO, LLM Shepherding cheap-prefix-then-complete).
